options.name: --debug
options.description:
Increase logging verbosity to show all debug
logs.

options.name: --localAddress
options.description:
The local address to use for calls redirections. Specify
http(s)://my_local_url

options.name: --serverAddress
options.description:
The server address. Specify http(s)://my_server_url, it
will switch automatically to ws(s) protocol

options.name: --tunnelId
options.description:
The tunnelId to use. will represents serviceName on server
side.
